name: 31_Cancer_Prediction_SVM_BreastCancer_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mradi wa utabiri wa saratani ya matiti kwa kutumia mfano wa SVM na seti ya data ya Breast Cancer Wisconsin? Pakia seti ya data na fanya uteuzi wa vipengele ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza kielekezi cha SVM kwa utabiri wa saratani katika `src/model.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Weka pamoja ripoti ya kina inayofafanua mchakato mzima-kuanzia usindikaji wa data hadi mafunzo na tathmini ya mfano. Ripoti inapaswa kufunika mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele na kujumuisha ramani ya joto ya wazi ya vipimo vya utendaji. Hifadhi ripoti kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" inatumika.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kielekezi cha "SVM classifier" kinatumika kwa utabiri wa saratani na kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele unapaswa kuandikwa vizuri katika ripoti, ukieleza kwa nini vipengele fulani vilichaguliwa.
Ramani ya joto inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya vipimo tofauti vya utendaji, kama vile usahihi, kumbukumbu, na alama ya F1.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha majadiliano juu ya utendaji wa mfano na maeneo yanayoweza kuboreshwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" inatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code files (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `train.py`) are all "minimal semantic placeholders" that do not actually load, process, or use the Breast Cancer Wisconsin dataset. The `data_loader.py` simply returns a dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": ...}` without any real data loading logic, and there is no import of `sklearn.datasets.load_breast_cancer` or any other mechanism to fetch the dataset. The trajectory evidence also confirms no steps related to loading or processing the Breast Cancer Wisconsin dataset were recorded.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual feature selection logic. It is a minimal placeholder/stub that only contains:
- A `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`
- A `build_transforms()` function returning a static list
- No imports of feature selection libraries (e.g., `sklearn.feature_selection`, `SelectKBest`, `RFE`, etc.)
- No actual dataset loading, preprocessing, or feature selection operations

The file merely lists the requirement as a string constant (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`) without implementing it. There is no real feature selection being performed to identify important features.

judge_stats.criteria: Kielekezi cha "SVM classifier" kinatumika kwa utabiri wa saratani na kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual SVM classifier. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings and a `build_model()` function that returns a string `"model placeholder"`. There is no import of `sklearn.svm.SVC` or any other SVM library, no actual model training or prediction logic, and no real SVM implementation whatsoever. The file is explicitly described as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a functional SVM classifier.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal/stub implementation that does not implement any cross-validation. The `train()` function simply iterates through a range of numbers and accumulates a score (`score += step`), with no machine learning model, no dataset loading, and no cross-validation logic whatsoever. There is no use of `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, or any other cross-validation mechanism. The file is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and does not fulfill the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists in the project structure as shown in the workspace tree. Although the image content could not be read due to a technical error in the evaluation system (media type mismatch during base64 reading), the file itself is present at the correct path `results\figures\confusion_matrix.png`, confirming it was generated and saved as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The PDF file `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf` exists in the project structure, but its content cannot be read — it is reported as an empty file (`'Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file'`). This means the report was not properly generated or saved. Additionally, the trajectory evidence confirms there is no recorded execution of any PDF generation process, and no evidence of data processing, model training, or evaluation results being written into the report. Therefore, the requirement for a comprehensive report saved as a valid PDF is not satisfied.
